response.original_title: Lasya Kavya: The World of Alarmel Valli
response.overview: 'Lasya Kavya' - a film on iconic Bharatanatyam dancer and choreographer Alarmel Valli, by award-winning director Sankalp Meshram, explores the intellectual, emotional and spiritual contexts within which she performs. A diverse range of performance, rehearsal, choreography and teaching sequences are interwoven with interviews and archival footage of the dancer with her dance and music gurus, offering glimpses into core ideas and complex facets of her art.
response.title: Lasya Kavya: The World of Alarmel Valli
